_comment: These servers need API keys / OAuth. Fill the placeholders, then copy the entries you want into config/mcp.json (or run: python scripts/install_to_lmstudio.py --include-keys). JSON has no comments, so the leading-underscore keys here are just notes — remove them before use.

github._about: Full GitHub API (Claude-parity): repos, branches, files, issues, PRs, code search, releases, Actions, gists. Token: https://github.com/settings/tokens scopes repo workflow read:org

github-watch._about: Complements github MCP: watch PRs/issues/repos and poll for CI/review/merge changes (gh_watch, gh_poll). Same token as github.

google-workspace._about: Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Slides. Needs a Google Cloud OAuth client (Desktop type). See CATALOG.md > Google Workspace for the 5-minute setup.

slack._about: Read/post Slack messages. Create a bot at https://api.slack.com/apps

brave-search._about: Web/local search via Brave. Free key at https://brave.com/search/api/

firecrawl._about: High-quality web scraping/crawling to clean markdown. Key at https://firecrawl.dev

postgres._about: Query/inspect a PostgreSQL database. Replace the connection string.

sqlite._about: Query a local SQLite database file.

puppeteer._about: Chromium browser automation (alternative to playwright). No key, but heavier.

sentry._about: Inspect Sentry issues/errors. Auth token from your Sentry account.
